How to Buy PEPE 2.0

How to Buy PEPE 2.0 on Ethereum 💥

Download and set up MetaMask or any Web3 wallet.
Fund your wallet with ETH via your favorite exchange.
Go to Uniswap and paste the PEPE 2.0 contract address.
Swap ETH for PEPE 2.0 — and welcome to the meme revolution!
